prompts.title: UNIVERSAL_REALITY_FRAMEWORK-0
prompts.purpose: Formalize the live semantic and world substrate into one universal reality framework grounded in repo reality.
expected_outputs: mapping from live semantic roots into framework terms
prompts.notes: Must extend existing semantic roots rather than invent a clean-room ontology.

prompts.title: DOMAIN_CONTRACT_TEMPLATE-0
prompts.purpose: Turn live law, experience, domain pack, and schema law surfaces into one reusable domain contract template.
expected_outputs: template-boundary notes for packs and schema law
prompts.notes: Should be treated as consolidation over existing contract surfaces.

prompts.title: CAPABILITY_SURFACES-0
prompts.purpose: Freeze the capability vocabulary already spread across control, compatibility, and pack surfaces.
prompts.notes: This is a formalization pass over live surfaces, not a new capability system.

prompts.title: REPRESENTATION_LADDERS_AND_SEMANTIC_ASCENT-0
prompts.purpose: Turn truth, perceived, and render separation into an explicit representation ladder and semantic ascent/descent model.
prompts.notes: Must preserve observer/renderer/truth separation from canon.

prompts.title: FORMALIZATION_CHAIN-0
prompts.purpose: Define the recognition, formalization, and substitution chain from live proof and semantic-domain evidence.
prompts.notes: Should stay grounded in live proof and planning surfaces.

prompts.title: PLAYER_DESIRE_ACCEPTANCE_MAP-0
prompts.purpose: Formalize player-facing acceptance, refusal, and profile boundaries from existing experience and law surfaces.
expected_outputs: refusal taxonomy for later task and UI work
prompts.notes: Must derive from live profile and pack surfaces.

prompts.title: CROSS_DOMAIN_BRIDGES-0
prompts.purpose: Define cross-domain bridges only after explicit review of the semantic ownership split zones.
prompts.notes: Human review is mandatory because bridge semantics touch quarantine zones directly.

prompts.title: AGENT_GOVERNANCE-0
prompts.purpose: Confirm and normalize the already-existing governance baseline rather than inventing a new one.
expected_outputs: explicit confirmation that no greenfield baseline is needed
prompts.notes: This is a consolidation and refusal prompt, not a new governance baseline prompt.

prompts.title: AGENT_MIRRORS-0
prompts.purpose: Harmonize fragmented instruction and guidance layers into vendor-neutral human and agent mirrors.
prompts.notes: Should merge live guidance layers instead of adding more parallel docs.

prompts.title: AGENT_SAFETY_POLICY-0
prompts.purpose: Consolidate the safety, refusal, permission, and escalation rules already present in repo governance.
prompts.notes: This preserves an existing baseline and tightens wording and routing.

prompts.title: XSTACK_TASK_CATALOG-0
prompts.purpose: Publish the governed XStack task catalog after Λ capability vocabulary is frozen.
prompts.notes: The catalog must inherit Λ capability semantics and Σ safety rules.

prompts.title: NATURAL_LANGUAGE_TASK_BRIDGE-0
prompts.purpose: Bind natural-language task requests to the governed task catalog, capability surfaces, and acceptance map.
prompts.notes: Must remain vendor-neutral and capability-governed.

prompts.title: MCP_INTERFACE-0
prompts.purpose: Define the governed MCP and wrapper surface after task, safety, and mirror layers already exist.
prompts.notes: Do not freeze wrappers before task and capability vocabulary is stable.

prompts.title: RUNTIME_KERNEL_MODEL-0
prompts.purpose: Extract the runtime kernel model from the live engine, game, app, and process spine.
prompts.notes: Must not crown the thin runtime root as the canonical orchestrator home.

prompts.title: COMPONENT_MODEL-0
prompts.purpose: Define the component model from the live distributed substrate and Λ domain contract template.
prompts.notes: Should derive from the live substrate cluster and not from naming assumptions.

prompts.title: EVENT_LOG-0
prompts.purpose: Consolidate event-log, replay, drift, and dispute-bundle surfaces into one runtime event-log contract.
prompts.notes: Must extend live replay and drift surfaces rather than create a new logging universe.

prompts.title: STATE_EXTERNALIZATION-0
prompts.purpose: Freeze lawful export, import, and ownership boundaries for authoritative state.
prompts.notes: State classes must inherit Λ truth and representation semantics.

prompts.title: RUNTIME_SERVICES-0
prompts.purpose: Formalize runtime and service boundaries from the already-existing distributed runtime substrate.
prompts.notes: Should mine the live service substrate before inventing new service layers.

prompts.title: ASSET_PIPELINE-0
prompts.purpose: Map and freeze the runtime-facing asset pipeline over the tool and ingestion surfaces already visible in the repo.
prompts.notes: Needed before later render and live-mount work.

prompts.title: SANDBOXING-0
prompts.purpose: Normalize the sandbox model over existing sandbox tests and command surfaces.
prompts.notes: Should extend existing refusal and sandbox behavior rather than assume none exists.

prompts.title: BUILD_GRAPH_LOCK-0
prompts.purpose: Freeze the build graph over the existing build, preset, CI, and architecture registry substrate.
prompts.notes: This is normalization over the existing build and architecture spine.

prompts.title: PRESET_CONSOLIDATION-0
prompts.purpose: Normalize the preset and toolchain matrix already present in the repo.
prompts.notes: Should preserve the current matrix and remove ambiguity, not rebuild tooling.

prompts.title: VERSIONING_CONSTITUTION-0
prompts.purpose: Write the explicit versioning constitution that separates human-facing version labels from machine-facing identity and compatibility truths.
prompts.notes: Must explicitly keep suite, product, protocol, schema, format, contract, build, and release profile truths distinct.

prompts.title: RELEASE_INDEX_POLICY-0
prompts.purpose: Consolidate live release-index, update-channel, trust, yanked, and resolver behavior into one policy surface.
prompts.notes: Should consolidate policy already visible in code and manifests.

prompts.title: MANUAL_AUTOMATION_PARITY-0
prompts.purpose: Codify parity between governed manual and automated flows using existing parity tests and XStack tooling.
prompts.notes: This is validation and doctrine work over existing parity surfaces.

prompts.title: BUILD_REPRO_MATRIX-0
prompts.purpose: Turn the live preset and toolchain matrix into an explicit reproducibility matrix.
prompts.notes: Should normalize a rich existing matrix rather than invent one.

prompts.title: RELEASE_PIPELINE-0
prompts.purpose: Freeze the release pipeline as a governed flow over existing release, distribution, compatibility, and XStack tooling.
prompts.notes: This should consolidate the existing tooling stack into one governed flow.

prompts.title: ARCHIVE_MIRROR-0
prompts.purpose: Consolidate archive and mirror behavior from existing archive policy code and registry surfaces.
prompts.notes: Archive policy already exists in live code and registry form.

prompts.title: PUBLICATION_MODELS-0
prompts.purpose: Freeze publication models only after versioning and release-pipeline doctrine exist.
prompts.notes: Publication policy is a human-review zone and must not silently choose distribution truth.

prompts.title: LICENSE_CAPABILITY-0
prompts.purpose: Consolidate licensing and capability policy from existing secure, trust, and pack-compat surfaces.
prompts.notes: Must remain explicitly tied to pack-driven integration and capability surfaces.

prompts.title: RELEASE_OPS-0
prompts.purpose: Freeze release operations over the existing operator, release, control, and XStack tooling cluster.
prompts.notes: This is consolidation over strong existing operator surfaces.

prompts.title: DISASTER_DOWNGRADE_POLICY-0
prompts.purpose: Turn rollback, yank, and degraded-boot behavior into one explicit downgrade and disaster doctrine.
prompts.notes: Should refine a live rollback substrate that already exists.

prompts.title: OPERATOR_TRANSACTION_LOG-0
prompts.purpose: Extend install/update transaction logging into a broader operator transaction contract.
prompts.notes: Later runtime cutovers and trust changes depend on this operator discipline.

prompts.title: RELEASE_CONTRACT_PROFILE-0
prompts.purpose: Author the missing release contract profile artifact family over the existing identity and release substrate.
prompts.notes: This is a consolidation prompt for already-existing identity and release signals.

prompts.title: ARTIFACT_NAMING_SPEC-0
prompts.purpose: Freeze artifact naming rules as a refinement of versioning and release contract doctrine.
prompts.notes: Naming must follow explicit identity and release-profile doctrine, not ad hoc product strings.

prompts.title: CHANGELOG_POLICY-0
prompts.purpose: Convert existing changelog-like update surfaces into one governed changelog policy aligned to release identity doctrine.
prompts.notes: The repo already has changelog substrate; this prompt governs it.

prompts.title: TARGET_NAMING_POLICY-0
prompts.purpose: Define target naming rules for products, bundles, and outputs so names align with versioning and release contract doctrine.
prompts.notes: Target names are governed output identity, not informal labels.

prompts.title: MODULE_LOADER-0
prompts.purpose: Insert a governed module-loader foundation only after runtime grounding and Υ constitutions establish the right component and release boundaries.
expected_outputs: module loader design or implementation package
prompts.notes: This stays blocked until runtime boundaries and release doctrine are grounded.

prompts.title: LIFECYCLE_MANAGER-0
prompts.purpose: Introduce governed startup, shutdown, handoff, and rollback choreography after runtime service boundaries and release-control doctrine are explicit.
expected_outputs: lifecycle manager design or implementation package
prompts.notes: No explicit lifecycle-manager surface exists yet in the live repo.

prompts.title: SNAPSHOT_SERVICE-0
prompts.purpose: Turn checkpoint and replay precursors into one explicit snapshot service only after lifecycle and state-externalization contracts are frozen.
expected_outputs: snapshot service design or implementation package
prompts.notes: Checkpoint code does not yet equal a unified snapshot service.

prompts.title: FRAMEGRAPH-0
prompts.purpose: Create the missing framegraph foundation after asset-pipeline and lifecycle boundaries are stable.
prompts.notes: The explicit framegraph foundation is still missing in the live repo.

prompts.title: RENDER_DEVICE-0
prompts.purpose: Introduce a governed render-device abstraction only after the framegraph and build/runtime attachment points are explicit.
prompts.notes: This is paired with framegraph work and remains blocked by missing foundations.

prompts.title: MULTI_VERSION_COEXISTENCE-0
prompts.purpose: Define coexistence rules only after semantic ownership review and versioning constitution work exist.
expected_outputs: explicit refusal and unresolved conflict list
prompts.notes: This directly touches the schema and pack split zones.

prompts.title: HOTSWAP_BOUNDARIES-0
prompts.purpose: Define hotswap boundaries only after lifecycle, snapshot, coexistence, and downgrade doctrine exist.
prompts.notes: Hotswap is explicitly dangerous if frozen early.

prompts.title: DISTRIBUTED_AUTHORITY-0
prompts.purpose: Keep distributed authority as a late design gate until lifecycle, snapshot, coexistence, bridge, and operator-transaction discipline are explicit.
expected_outputs: go/no-go criteria for later distributed live ops
prompts.notes: Current repo evidence is only precursor-level, not foundation-safe.

prompts.title: REPLACEABILITY-0
prompts.purpose: Treat replaceability as a late governed outcome rather than an early feature.
prompts.notes: Rollback primitives do not equal general replaceability readiness.

prompts.title: SERVICE_RESTARTS-0
prompts.purpose: Define service restart capability only after lifecycle and release-ops surfaces exist.
prompts.notes: Restart semantics remain dangerous without frozen lifecycle and cutover rules.

prompts.title: PARTIAL_LIVE_MODULE_RELOAD-0
prompts.purpose: Keep partial live module reload behind module loader, hotswap boundaries, and downgrade discipline.
prompts.notes: Still blocked by missing module-loader and hotswap foundations.

prompts.title: NON_BLOCKING_SAVE-0
prompts.purpose: Plan non-blocking save only after lifecycle and snapshot service exist as explicit foundations.
prompts.notes: Current save and checkpoint surfaces are insufficient on their own.

prompts.title: LIVE_SAVE_MIGRATION-0
prompts.purpose: Keep live save migration behind non-blocking save, snapshot service, downgrade policy, and operator transaction discipline.
prompts.notes: Migration precursors exist, but online save migration remains blocked.

prompts.title: CANARY_ROLLBACK_CUTOVER_OPERATIONS-0
prompts.purpose: Treat canary, rollback, and cutover work as an extension of the existing rollback and release substrate.
expected_outputs: canary, rollback, and cutover operations policy
prompts.notes: This is the narrowest late-stage Ζ prompt with real live substrate behind it.

prompts.title: TRUST_ROOT_LIVE_CHANGES-0
prompts.purpose: Keep live trust-root and trust-change planning behind release ops, transaction logging, and publication/licensing review.
prompts.notes: Strong trust tooling exists, but live trust rotation remains blocked.

prompts.title: SHARD_RELOCATION_AND_DISTRIBUTED_LIVE_OPS-0
prompts.purpose: Keep shard relocation and distributed live ops behind distributed authority, snapshot service, downgrade discipline, and explicit executive review.
prompts.notes: Current repo evidence is still precursor-level and the blueprint treats this as late or unrealistic.

prompts.title: EXTREME_LONG_HORIZON_LIVE_OPS-0
prompts.purpose: Preserve extreme long-horizon live-ops work as a research placeholder only after distributed live ops cease to be speculative.
expected_outputs: placeholder research brief or explicit deferment
prompts.notes: This is not near-term execution work and must remain explicitly late and gated.
